name: JavaScript Algorithms and Data Structures
description: This certification validated my foundational understanding of JavaScript programming including algorithms, data structures, and problem-solving skills. I demonstrated proficiency in core JavaScript concepts essential for any modern web development role.
keyPoints: Core JavaScript fundamentals and ES6+ features
Data structures including arrays, objects, stacks, and queues

name: Claude Code in Action
description: This certification validates my proficiency in using Claude Code, Anthropic's AI-powered coding assistant. Through practical exercises and real-world applications, I demonstrated the ability to leverage Claude Code effectively for software development tasks, debugging, code review, and building production-ready applications.
keyPoints: Efficient AI-assisted development workflows using Claude Code
Building and deploying production applications with AI assistance
Code review and debugging using AI-powered tools
Best practices for human-AI collaboration in software development
